data: {"generalSituation":"With the band of clouds covering the coast of Guangdong thinning out, the weather will improve over the region today and tomorrow. A trough of low pressure is expected to develop gradually and edge closer to the coastal areas of southern China early to midweek next week. The weather will become unsettled over the region. The northeast monsoon will affect southern China in the middle and latter parts of next week. Temperatures will fall slightly over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260425","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"Northeast force 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy. One or two showers at first. Slightly cooler in the morning.
